description: Configure GPredict for a university high-altitude balloon mission. Delete the 'L_Band_Test' module while preserving the default Amateur module. Create two ground stations: 'Launch_Site' (34.4735 N, 104.2447 W, 1229m) and 'Recovery_Team' (35.2220 N, 101.8313 W, 1099m). Create a tracking module named 'HAB_Relays' containing satellites ISS (25544), SO-50 (27607), AO-85 (40967), and AO-91 (43017), and set it to use the 'Launch_Site' ground station for predictions. Switch the application to Imperial units to comply with FAA altitude regulations. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
